steps.title: Spot the clarifying detail
steps.content: The colon after the blank introduces the measurement detail: seven standard deviations higher than predicted. This phrase quantifies how much the actual result exceeded the prediction—a measurement of magnitude or scale.

steps.title: Match the word to what is measured
steps.content: The word scale directly names magnitude—the size of a deviation. Cause explains why, existence asks whether, and implication describes consequences, but the blank requires a word for the measured SIZE of the difference. That is the correct answer.
